channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Haves, have-nots and know-nots: Inside AI's new class divide
item.description: A stark class divide now separates how Americans experience artificial intelligence: For advanced users, AI feels like a revolution; for others, it is a f...

item.title: OpenAI's second-in-command resigns due to health problems
item.description: Fidji Simo steps down after medical leave for a worsening chronic condition. Her departure removes a key figure from OpenAI.

item.title: AI growth challenges Big Tech's transparency claims
item.description: Major tech companies, once vocal about climate goals, now face increased scrutiny over their disclosure of AI's environmental impact.

item.title: Conservative figures attend Charlie Kirk murder hearing
item.description: Prominent conservatives gather in a Utah courthouse for the preliminary hearing of a man accused of murder, drawing significant attention.
